days.title: Sentosa Island Adventure
days.weather: Partly cloudy with a chance of afternoon thunderstorms. High 31°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Morning: Visit Universal Studios Singapore and take the Skyline Luge
Afternoon: Relax at Siloso Beach or visit S.E.A. Aquarium
Evening: Attend the Wings of Time night show
days.budgetNote: Focus on Sentosa attractions. Budget allows for ride passes and meals on the island.

days.title: Nature & Urban Icons
days.weather: Hot and humid with frequent short showers. High 32°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Morning: Explore the Canopy Walk and free-flying birds at River Wonders/Bird Paradise
Afternoon: Return to city center, visit SMU campus and nearby ArtScience Museum
Evening: Explore Jewel Changi Airport (Shiseido Forest Valley & Rain Vortex)
days.budgetNote: Free entry for Bird Paradise canopy walk and Jewel attractions helps stay within budget.

days.title: City Culture & Final Explorations
days.weather: Thunderstorms likely in the late afternoon. High 31°C. Seasonal estimate for June.
activities: Morning: Guided walking tour or self-exploration of SMU and Raffles Place
Afternoon: Visit Marina Bay Sands area or Clarke Quay for shopping and drinks
Evening: Farewell dinner at a local hawker center or casual restaurant
days.budgetNote: Evening activities kept low-cost to preserve budget from Days 1-2.

categories.name: Clothing
items: Light jacket or cardigan for heavy air-conditioned indoor spaces (malls, museums, Jewel)

categories.name: Rain Gear & Protection
items: Lightweight rain poncho or waterproof jacket

categories.name: Electronics
items: Waterproof phone case or dry bag

categories.name: Documents & Essentials
items: Digital and physical copies of itinerary
